title: Mario Paint Composer - The Final Climb (Donkey Kong '94)
description:
Spent all last night working on this but actually got it done in one session. Had to actually slow down the original track at one point (you know where) to be able to tell what the notes were. You know what I like about this song? The drumloop never changes.

Then I spent another 2 hours trying to figure out how to get a single goddamn video editor to add a basic "fade out" effect to the end of the video and not completely butcher the published product. So much for that.
